news.title: 美军加油机伊拉克坠毁致4死
news.title0: Four killed after US refuelling plane crashes in Iraq, military confirms
news.content: 美军一架KC-135空中加油机在伊拉克西部坠毁，机上六名机组人员中有四人遇难。事故原因正在调查中。
news.content0: Four of six crew aboard a US military refuelling aircraft have died after it crashed in western Iraq, US Central Command (Centcom) says.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 美国或从韩国抽调导弹防御系统至中东
news.title0: The US may move some of its anti-missile system - and it's sparking unease in South Korea
news.content: 据报道，美国正考虑将部署在韩国的“萨德”反导系统部分组件重新部署至中东，以应对伊朗冲突，此举引发韩国担忧。
news.content0: The US is relocating parts of a missile defence system installed in South Korea to the Middle East, according to officials cited by the Washington Post and South Korean news outlets.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 澳商人因向疑似中国间谍提供报告获罪
news.title0: Australian businessman found guilty of working for suspected Chinese spies
news.content: 一名澳大利亚商人因向两名他本应怀疑是中国间谍的人士提供报告，被悉尼法院裁定犯有鲁莽外国干涉罪，面临最高15年监禁。
news.content0: An Australian businessman has been found guilty of reckless foreign interference over his compilation of reports for two people who prosecutors said he should have suspected were Chinese spies.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 联合国警告特朗普移民言论或煽动仇恨犯罪
news.title0: Trump's immigration comments may incite hate crimes, UN watchdog says
news.content: 联合国消除种族歧视委员会警告称，特朗普总统及其他美国政客的“种族主义仇恨言论”助长了侵犯人权行为，可能煽动仇恨犯罪。
news.content0: A United Nations watchdog has warned that "racist hate speech" used by President Donald Trump and other US politicians has fuelled human rights violations.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 英国游客因伊朗战争滞留海外陷困境
news.title0: 'I missed my chemo and have a £12,000 hotel bill': British holidaymakers stranded by Iran war
news.content: 伊朗战争爆发导致航班取消，众多英国游客被困海外，面临巨额额外食宿费用，甚至有癌症患者因此错过化疗。
news.content0: British holidaymakers have told the BBC they are stranded abroad after their flights were cancelled when the US-Israeli war with Iran broke out.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 失传60年《神秘博士》剧集重见天日
news.title0: Lost Doctor Who episodes found in 'eclectic' collection
news.content: 两名自1960年代播出后便失传的《神秘博士》早期剧集，在一名收藏家的旧胶片中被意外发现，将于复活节在BBC iPlayer上线。
news.content0: A cardboard box found in a collector's "ramshackle" collection of vintage films contained two episodes of Doctor Who that have not been viewed since airing in the 1960s.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 韩国警方突查交通部调查空难处理
news.title0: South Korea police raid transport ministry over Jeju Air crash
news.content: 韩国警方突袭交通部总部，调查其对去年济州航空致命空难的处理方式。此前在事故现场碎石中发现了更多遗骸和遗物。
news.content0: South Korean police have raided the headquarters of the transport ministry as questions mount over its handling of the country's deadliest aviation disaster.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 智利建筑师斯米利安·拉迪奇获普利兹克奖
news.title0: Pritzker Prize 2026: Chile’s Smiljan Radić wins ‘Nobel’ of architecture
news.content: 智利建筑师斯米利安·拉迪奇荣获2026年普利兹克建筑奖。其作品以实验性设计著称，包括伦敦的环形展馆和由巨石支撑的餐厅。
news.content0: Chilean architect Smiljan Radić, whose often-experimental designs include a doughnut-shaped pavilion in London and a restaurant held up by boulders in Santiago, was named the winner of this year’s Pritzker Prize — an award often dubbed the field’s equivalent to a Nobel Prize — on Thursday.
news.author: CNN

news.title: 加拿大宣布大幅加强北极军事存在
news.title0: Canada to Expand Military Presence in Arctic, Following Trump Threats
news.content: 加拿大总理马克·卡尼宣布一项数十亿加元计划，将在北极地区大幅增强军事能力，包括建立新基地，以应对特朗普的威胁言论。
news.content0: Prime Minister Mark Carney of Canada unveiled a multibillion-dollar plan on Thursday to significantly build up the country’s military capacity in the Arctic, including establishing new bases in a region where the country has had to rely on the United States to ensure its defense.
news.author: NYTimes
